REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IN OPPOSITION TO DEFTS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT FOR DECLARATORY JUDGMENT; AND OBJECTION TO DEFT'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT FOR DECLARATORY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PLACE2PARK LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY MEHTA, MINESH

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 8, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302, ON THE COURT'S MOTION. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFFS HAVE FAILED TO EXHAUST THEIR ADMINISTRATIVE REMEDIES PRIOR TO FILING THIS SUIT. SEE COMPLAINT 18-32. CODE CIV. PROC. 430.10 (A). PLAINTIFFS' SUIT IS BARRED AS A MATTER OF LAW BY THE "PAY FIRST, LITIGATE LATER" RULE. SEE BATT V. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, (2008) 155 CAL. APP. 4TH 65; FLYING DUTCHMAN PARK, INC. V. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, (2001) 93 CAL. APP. 4TH 1129. PLAINTIFFS DO NOT IDENTIFY HOW THEY WILL AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO CURE THESE DEFECTS. THE COURT GRANTS THE REQUESTS FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: LAVENNA WARD, CSR # 7077

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2013 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. AILEEN M. MCGRATH, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-4236 APPEARING
FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - The demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiffs have failed to exhaust their administrative remedies prior to filing this suit. See Complaint 18-32. Code Civ. Proc. 430.10 (a). Plaintiffs' suit is barred as a matter of law by the "pay first, litigate later" rule. See Batt v. City and County of San Francisco, (2008) 155 Cal. App. 4th 65; Flying Dutchman Park, Inc. v. City and County of San Francisco, (2001) 93 Cal. App. 4th 1129. Plaintiffs do not identify how they will amend the complaint to cure these defects. The court grants the requests for judicial notice. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVenna Ward, CSR # 7077 =302/MJM

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-14-2012 Continued To Jan-08-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to January 8, 2013, on the Court's motion. Judge: Marla Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Plaintiff'S Order To Show Cause To Defendants Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Sep-18-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: kymberleigh korpus, esq., wood robbins llp, 415.247.7100, for plaintiffs place2park llc & minesh mehta.
aileen mcgrath, deputy city attorney, 415.554.3800, for defendant city and county of san francisco.

RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT TOOK Plaintiff'S MOTION FOR Preliminary Injunction UNDER SUBMISSION. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

***AFTER HEARING, THE COURT DENYS PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. ORDER DENYING PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION SIGNED. ***
